role_adherence_notes.linguistic: Focused on script and distance units ('Mile 27').
role_adherence_notes.landscape: Analyzed terrain, vegetation, and climate cues.
role_adherence_notes.botanics: Identified plant biomes (shortgrass prairie, xeric shrubland).

verdict.overall_verdict_notes: The pipeline correctly identified the United States. All agents adhered to their domains, provided concrete evidence, and the tournament logic correctly prioritized the US over the closest competitor (Canada) based on infrastructure and biome specifics.

visual_consistency_notes.landscape: Accurately described arid high-plains and scrub.
visual_consistency_notes.botanics: Correctly identified dormant grasses and shrubs.
visual_consistency_notes.regulatory: Correctly identified W-beam guardrails and blue signage.
visual_consistency_notes.meta: Correctly identified pickup truck and camera shadow.
